options.name: --working-directory
options.description: Working directory. Required when updating a single repository. []

options.name: --stable-packages
options.description: Use stable NuGet package versions. This is the default configuration. [default: False]

options.name: --preview-packages
options.description: Use preview NuGet package versions. [default: False]

options.name: --solutions-to-check
options.description: List of Solution(s) to update in the  directory. [default: False]

options.name: --repos-to-update
options.description: List of repository(es) to update. [default: False]

options.name: --exclusion-list
options.description: List of solution names to exclude from the update. Comma separated, name only. []

options.name: --branch-to-pr
options.description: Name of the branch to submit PR with updates. Default is 'main'. [default: main]

options.name: --git-hub-user
options.description: Name of the git hub users. Used for creating PR and authentication. Default is 'nfbot' [default: nfbot]

options.name: --git-hub-email
options.description: Email of the git hub users. Used for creating commits. Default is 'nanoframework@outlook.com' [default: nanoframework@outlook.com]

options.name: --nuget-config
options.description: Path to nuget.config file to use for update operations. Leave  to use 'nuget.org' []

options.name: --repo-owner
options.description: Github repository owner (https://github.com/[repoOwner]/repositoryName). If not provided, created based on github repository url where the tool was invoked. []

options.name: --git-hub-auth
options.description: GitHub authentication token. If not provided, the tool will try to use the GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable. []

options.name: --use-git-token-for-clone
options.description: Set to true if you trying to update private GitHub repository. Default is false. [default: False]

arguments.name: ARGS
arguments.description: List of Solutions files to check or repositories to update. According to option specified with  or . []
